title: Yard Sale Flyer Series
tagline: A multi-format flyer set designed for print, square social, and event promotion touchpoints.

overview.title: Multi-Format Promotion
overview.description: This yard sale set translates one visual concept across three formats so the message stays consistent in different channels. The system keeps hierarchy clear while adapting composition for poster, square post, and event graphics.

images.alt: Main yard sale flyer poster layout
images.caption: Primary poster format for local print and notice board distribution.
Square version optimized for feed-based social sharing.
Event cover variant designed for Facebook event promotion.
